{{Quote|The micro-grenade launcher is a devastating weapon, but make sure that you replace the magnetic rings that propel the explosive. During a firefight on Maro Della, the rings—which had degraded after repeated use—failed and jammed a grenade in the barrel. I only had a couple of seconds to toss the gun before the grenade detonated.|Hyannis, ''Gundark's Gear Datalog''|<ref name="GFTPG">''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''</ref>}}
The '''Model MGL-1''' was a type of [[Micro-grenade launcher/Legends|micro-grenade launcher]] designed by [[Locris Syndicates/Legends|Locris Syndicates]]. It was designed to fire [[Micro-grenade/Legends|Micro-grenades]] quickly and with minimal training for the user. It could be mounted on another [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] and be used as a separate weapon.

The MGL-1 acted as a sort of gauss gun, using magnetic rings to propel each grenade at high velocity with minimal scattering. A computerized firing system allowed for increase accuracy thanks to its target recognition system, which combined with its low recoil and soundless operation made it a favorite of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]]. However the magnetic rings would eventually require replacement, otherwise causing the launcher to jam and leaving an armed grenade stuck in the barrel.<ref name="GFTPG" />
